title: SpaceX’s IPO Triumph, Anthropic’s Fable Fumble, OpenAI’s Price War
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss SpaceX's IPO, its implications for AI competitors OpenAI and Anthropic, Anthropic's Fable rollout issues, and competitive pricing dynamics in the AI model market. They cover whether AI models are becoming commoditized and Apple's Siri improvements.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy work through several developments: SpaceX's IPO and what it signals for AI rivals OpenAI and Anthropic, Anthropic's troubled Fable rollout, and the pricing dynamics now shaping the AI model market. The discussion turns on whether AI models are sliding toward commoditization, with pricing strategy and competitive positioning as the central tension. They also weigh Apple's improvements to Siri.
